summary: PHASE 5.4 Portfolio Accounts Engine backend testing completed. All 25 API tests passed (100%). Unified portfolio state aggregation across BINANCE, BYBIT, OKX exchanges working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolio-accounts/health - returns healthy status with 5 components (account_aggregator, balance_aggregator, position_aggregator, margin_engine, portfolio_state_builder)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/status - returns detailed component status
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/state - returns unified portfolio state (totalEquity, positionsCount, exchangeCount, etc)
POST /api/portfolio-accounts/refresh - refreshes data from exchanges (BINANCE, BYBIT, OKX)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/accounts - returns list of accounts with equity, margin, pnl
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/accounts?exchange=BINANCE - returns specific exchange account
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/balances - returns balances aggregated by asset
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/balances?exchange=BINANCE - returns exchange-specific balances
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/balances/distribution - returns asset and exchange distribution percentages
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/positions - returns positions aggregated by symbol
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/positions?exchange=BINANCE - returns exchange positions
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/positions/long-short - returns long/short split (count, notional, percentage)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/margin - returns margin info with risk levels (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/margin?exchange=BINANCE - returns exchange-specific margin
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exchange/BINANCE - returns detailed BINANCE info
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exchange/BYBIT - returns detailed BYBIT info
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exchange/OKX - returns detailed OKX info
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exchange/INVALID - returns simulated data (demo mode)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exposure - returns position exposure by symbol
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/exposure?symbol=BTCUSDT - returns specific symbol exposure
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/history - returns portfolio history (in-memory and database)
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/history?limit=10 - respects limit parameter
GET /api/portfolio-accounts/analytics - returns portfolio analytics
Integration: refresh -> state -> accounts -> positions flow works correctly
Integration: unified portfolio aggregates correctly across 3 exchanges
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - well-structured with clear separation of concerns
Each aggregator (account, balance, position) properly handles simulation fallback
MarginEngine correctly calculates risk levels based on utilization thresholds
seed_data_creation: None required - all data is SIMULATED via aggregators for demo purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHASE 5.4 Portfolio Accounts Engine fully functional. Tests cover all 12 endpoints requested: health, state, refresh, accounts, balances, balances/distribution, positions, positions/long-short, margin, exchange/{exchange}, exposure, history. All exchange data is SIMULATED via _simulate_account, _simulate_balances, _simulate_positions methods in aggregators. Test file test_phase54_portfolio_accounts.py can be used for regression testing.

mocked_apis.AccountAggregator._simulate_account: SIMULATED - generates realistic account data per exchange
mocked_apis.BalanceAggregator._simulate_balances: SIMULATED - generates USDT, BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL balances
mocked_apis.PositionAggregator._simulate_positions: SIMULATED - generates BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT positions
